calendar.matters:
ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Off Calendar

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Manhattan Tankers Company, Inc.
Off Calendar Mar-29-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Manhattan Tankers Company, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768.

Michael Espinosa, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Mark Bulwinkle, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Manhattan Tankers Company, Inc.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on September 29, 2014.
Default was entered against defendant Mahattan Tankers Company, Inc. on May 6, 2015.
Statement of Damages was filed and served on May 6, 2015.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on February 20, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Mark Bulwinkle, and against the Defaulted Defendant Manhattan Tankers Company, Inc., as follows:

Economic Damages - $87,500.00.
Non-Economic Damages - $750,000.00
Total - $837,500.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Mar-05-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-06-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
